title: ferray-linalg: no LinAlgError type — uses generic FerrayError variants
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy has a dedicated numpy.linalg.LinAlgError exception class for linalg-specific errors (singular matrix, non-convergence, etc.). ferray-linalg uses FerrayError::SingularMatrix, FerrayError::InvalidValue, etc. from ferray-core. This is fine for Rust (the error enum is comprehensive), but downstream code that wants to match specifically on linalg errors must match on multiple FerrayError variants rather than one type. Consider whether a LinalgError wrapper type or a FerrayError::Linalg variant would improve ergonomics.
